title: Information
description: Result of organizing, interpreting, categorizing, or classifying data to assign meaning understandable by the addressee.

definitions.definition: Result of organizing, interpreting, categorizing, or classifying data to assign meaning understandable by the addressee.
definitions.notes: - Information depends on Data and is targeted.

definitions.definition: Knowledge exchangeable in the form of data, including representation information that enables interpretation of the data.
